testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: Franchisia helped us connect with qualified franchisees across the country. The platform made the entire process seamless.

testimonials.name: Mark Williams
testimonials.text: I found my dream franchise through Franchisia. The search filters and company profiles gave me all the information I needed.

testimonials.name: Emily Chen
testimonials.text: As a broker, this platform has been invaluable. I can manage multiple clients and opportunities all in one place.

testimonials.name: David Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The analytics and ROI calculators gave me the confidence to invest. Highly recommended for serious investors.

about.heroTitle: Building the Future of Franchise Networking
about.heroDesc: Franchisia is the leading professional network connecting franchisors, franchisees, consultors, investors, and suppliers worldwide.
about.mission: To democratize access to franchise opportunities and create a transparent, efficient ecosystem where every professional can find the perfect match.
about.vision: A world where franchise opportunities are accessible to everyone, empowering entrepreneurs to build successful businesses through meaningful connections.

teamMembers.name: Alexandra Reed
teamMembers.bio: Former franchisor with 15+ years of experience in the franchise industry.

timeline.title: The Idea
timeline.desc: Founded with a vision to transform the franchise industry.

timeline.title: Platform Launch
timeline.desc: Launched the first version of Franchisia with 500 listings.

timeline.title: 10K Users
timeline.desc: Reached 10,000 registered professionals on the platform.

timeline.title: AI Features
timeline.desc: Introduced AI-powered matching and investment calculators.

timeline.title: Industry Leader
timeline.desc: Recognized as the #1 franchise networking platform.
